description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Development that runs on workflow dispatch with an optional commit or tag input, on push to all branches except release/**, and on pull requests to the master branch. In a job that runs on a Docker environment with write permissions for ID tokens and repository contents, clean the Docker environment, checkout the specified commit or tag, configure AWS credentials, log in to the registry, build a Docker image with a dynamic tag based on the current commit hash, and push the image to Amazon ECR if the workflow is triggered by a pull request or if the master branch is targeted.
